claude-code-agent.name: Claude Code Agent
claude-code-agent.description: Executes code generation, analysis, and automated software tasks using Claude's advanced coding capabilities.
claude-code-agent.inputDescription: Task description and relevant code context
claude-code-agent.outputDescription: Generated code, analysis results, or task completion report

opencode-agent.name: OpenCode Agent
opencode-agent.description: Open-source code execution agent powered by DeepSeek for cost-efficient automated development tasks.
opencode-agent.inputDescription: Code task description and project context
opencode-agent.outputDescription: Implemented code changes and execution results

script-container.name: Script Container
script-container.description: Sandboxed execution environment for running custom scripts, data transformations, and automation tasks.
script-container.outputDescription: Script execution output and exit status

tealflow-cowork-chat.name: Tealflow Cowork Chat
tealflow-cowork-chat.description: Chat cowork agent with the tealflow MCP server attached for teal module exploration.
